title: Memory initialization is generated only inside the `ifndef SYNTHESIS` block
body:
As a similar issue was fixed back in firrtl, memory initialization is currently generated inside the `ifndef SYNTHESIS` block meaning some synthesys tools (like Yosys for example) doesn't pick that up breaking memory initialization on FPGAs.

This was treated in firrtl initially with an annotation and later with a --target:fpga flag which put the initialization block in it's own block after the SYNTHESYS `endif` like:

```verilog
...
`endif // SYNTHESIS
initial begin
  $readmemh("insns.hex", ram);
end
```

What would be the best way to do this? Some flag like the former `--target:fpga`?

References for the issue and PR:

- https://github.com/chipsalliance/firrtl/issues/2114
- https://github.com/chipsalliance/firrtl/pull/2166
